docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,650.00 FILED BY CHING, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT ARCINAS, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WITH VIVIAN CHOY ACTING AS A CANTONESE INTERPRETER ON HER BEHALF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHING, RUTH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARCINAS, ROBERT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
